mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_salary (employee_id, id_card, job_category_name, salary_period, salary_type, base_salary, attendance_days, base_amount, addition_amount, deduction_amount, payable_amount, remark, approve_remark, created_by, project_id) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{idCard}, #{jobCategoryName}, #{salaryPeriod}, #{salaryType}, #{baseSalary}, #{attendanceDays}, #{baseAmount}, #{additionAmount}, #{deductionAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{remark}, #{approveRemark}, #{createdBy}, #{projectId})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_salary SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, id_card = #{idCard}, job_category_name= #{jobCategoryName}, salary_period = #{salaryPeriod}, salary_type = #{salaryType}, base_salary = #{baseSalary}, attendance_days = #{attendanceDays}, base_amount = #{baseAmount}, addition_amount = #{additionAmount}, deduction_amount = #{deductionAmount}, payable_amount = #{payableAmount}, remark = #{remark}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, e.name AS employee_name, jc.name AS job_category_name FROM tb_salary s LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON s.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
